name: Database Service Restart
description: Automated runbook for restarting database services when they become unresponsive

steps.name: Check Database Workload Status
steps.description: Get current status of the database workload

steps.name: List Database Pods
steps.description: List all pods for the database workload

steps.name: Restart Database Workload
steps.description: Restart the database workload to recover from issues

steps.name: Verify Database Recovery
steps.description: Verify the database workload is running after restart
